problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site may resolve Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
